---
title: Strategy Kickoff
start_month: 1
end_month: 1
category: Strategy
responsible: CEO
priority: high
tags: [strategy, planning]
---

New-year leadership session to align on strategic priorities and set direction for the year ahead.

## Activities

- Review previous year's goal attainment
- Present and discuss strategic focus areas for the current year
- Assign ownership of strategic initiatives across the leadership team

## Attendees

Full leadership team and board chair.
